KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_FUSION_MATERIAL: Choose the material component to fuse
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_COMPONENT_TO_SCRAP: Choose a Component to turn into Scrap
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_REPLACEMENT: Choose cards to transform into Universal Material
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_DECOMPOSE: Choose a Material or Scrap to decompose
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_LIGHTWEIGHT: Choose a Component to make lightweight
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_SORTING: Choose cards to add to your Hand
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_STICKY: Choose a card to make Sticky
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_FILTER_DISCARD: Choose a card to discard; cancel to finish
KILLER_FACTORY_SELECT_BLUEPRINT: Choose a machine blueprint to install
